summary: VenuLoQ UI fixes verified on mobile viewport (390x844): Confirm Password field, mobile nav menu, and enlarged venue cards all working correctly.

confirm_password_field.details: Confirm Password field with data-testid='register-confirm-password' is visible and functional on mobile

register_page_fits_mobile.details: Document height matches viewport (844px) - all 3 fields and Create Account button visible without scrolling

password_match_validation.details: Form shows 'Passwords do not match' toast error when passwords differ

registration_flow_e2e.details: Registration with matching passwords successfully creates account and redirects to /my-enquiries

mobile_nav_menu_fixed_positioning.details: Mobile menu overlay uses fixed positioning (position: fixed, z-index: 50)

mobile_nav_login_btn_visible.details: Login button at position (16, 330) fully visible within viewport

mobile_nav_register_btn_visible.details: Register button at position (200, 330) fully visible within viewport - NOT cut off

mobile_venue_card_size.details: Venue cards have 130x130px image size (enlarged from 110x110)

mobile_venue_cards_per_screen.details: Approximately 3 venue cards visible per mobile screen as intended

login_flow_with_credentials.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 successful, redirected to /my-enquiries

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI fixes working: 1) RegisterPage has confirm password field (data-testid='register-confirm-password') with validation, 2) Header mobile menu uses fixed positioning with both Login/Register buttons visible within viewport, 3) MobileVenueCard has 130x130px images showing ~3 cards per screen. Tested on mobile viewport 390x844. Note: Header.js mobile menu is used on /partner, /favorites etc; landing and search pages have their own headers.
